Independent research project — not affiliated with the South Portland School Department or City of South Portland. AI-assisted analysis with full source transparency. Learn more.

Site Updates

A record of what changed with each pipeline run.

Site Updates

2026-03-24

  • Fixed evidence pipeline paths (evidence-pools to troves migration)
  • Re-normalized all 46 evidence sources
  • Re-bundled 18 meeting manifests with corrected paths
  • Added site freshness indicators and this changelog

2026-03-23

  • Regenerated 17 briefings for upcoming 2026-03-23 school board workshop
  • Added cumulative folds for 2026-03-05-city-council (15 personas)
  • Added cumulative folds for 2026-03-10-city-council (15 personas)
  • Renamed PERSONA-015 to use a fictional name
  • New evidence: FY27 Budget presentation and budget book for 3/23 workshop

2026-03-19

  • Regenerated all briefings for 2026-03-19 city council meeting
  • Added cumulative folds for 2026-03-19-city-council

SP Budget Watch — Independent analysis of the South Portland Schools FY27 budget. Built with sourced evidence from public meetings and budget documents.

This is an independent, volunteer project. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the South Portland School Department or City of South Portland. All analysis is AI-assisted with full source transparency. Learn more about our methodology. | Changelog
